function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap, inspected 99_system, used the inbox-processing workflow, treated the inbox item as a request rather than canonical truth, verified the bill in the finance lane, and did not mutate the workspace because the request is blocked on missing canonical support.
function.outcome_justification: The finance record at 50_finance/purchases/2026_01_30__eur_000050__bill__hearthline_sensor_bundle.md confirms a Bärenfunk Elektronik GmbH bill dated 2026-01-30 for EUR 50. The inbox request in 00_inbox/242_next-task.md also asks to confirm with the bank that it is paid. No local bank-confirmation record was available in the workspace, and the sandbox exposes no external banking or network tool, so the bank-confirmation part is unsupported.
